items.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows accelerate as BlackRock fund leads
items.content_text: Bitcoin ETF inflows rose as institutional demand improved for BTC.

items.content_text: Spot ETF inflow demand for bitcoin continued during the session.

items.title: Museum opens public archive of digital art
items.content_text: A museum opened a public archive of digital art and education materials.
